title: Create foundational runtime operations documents
summary: Added the first code-backed Stage 5 runtime documents for context mapping, event cataloging, MQ topology, and inventory reservation incident handling.
results: Cataloged active integration events and request/reply contracts.
Mapped the known Kafka and RabbitMQ logical channels visible in Wolverine configuration.
Created the first runbook for reservation-path failures.
Recorded the rule to keep runtime docs under .dev/operations until an explicit .ops migration threshold is met.
